title: Salty
description:
This mod adds new salty variations of vanilla food that will be more effective than the normal variations..

The food itself can be made from salt. And the salt itself can be bought from a villager or mined in underground caves.
body:
Salty Vanilla Food Variation - Better Than Regular Food in Nutritional Value

It can be made from salt, salt can be mined in mines as a block, which can be crafted into a handful of salt and in crafting make a salt variation of food

Salt can be bought from the butcher, if you upgrade your deals with him
